meta.name: Bandlapalli Roshan Babu
meta.title: Roshan Babu — AI & Quantum ML Researcher
meta.description: Bandlapalli Roshan Babu — AI Engineer, Quantum ML Researcher, NLP & RL Specialist | M.Tech AI & Data Science, Mahindra University | Qiskit Advocate 2025

hero.role: AI Engineer · Quantum ML Researcher · NLP & RL Specialist
hero.photoCaption: Roshan Babu, photographed at Mahindra University · 2025
hero.lead: Tech student in Artificial Intelligence & Data Science at Mahindra University, currently pioneering the development of the world's first Quantum-Classical Facial Biometric System at Lloyd's Bank Research. A Qiskit Advocate 2025, published researcher (ICIET), poster presenter at Supercomputing India 2025, Perplexity Campus Ambassador, and a member of the Indian National Throwball Team — Runner-up at the Indo-Sri Lanka Youth Cup 2024.

about.title: A researcher at the
about.leadProse: From neural networks to quantum circuits.
prose: I'm a passionate AI researcher and engineer completing my M.Tech in Artificial Intelligence & Data Science at Mahindra University, Hyderabad. Currently spearheading groundbreaking research on the world's first Quantum-Classical Facial Biometric System in collaboration with Lloyd's Bank.

My work spans the full spectrum of modern AI — from training deep neural networks and building conversational LLM agents to implementing Variational Quantum Circuits. I'm a Qiskit Advocate 2025 (selected by IBM), a published researcher, and a Perplexity Campus Ambassador driving AI literacy.
about.pullQuote: Building the bridge between Classical and Quantum Intelligence.
highlights: Research Intern at Lloyd's Bank — Quantum Biometrics
Published at ICIET — Inventory Management with AI

sections.title: Artificial Intelligence
sections.sub: Building intelligent systems with end-to-end ML pipelines and hybrid quantum-classical approaches.

items.dd: Scikit-learn, Pandas, NumPy · Classification, Regression, Clustering, Dimensionality Reduction
PyTorch, TensorFlow, Keras · Streamlit, Jupyter · Git, VS Code, Linux
Matplotlib, Seaborn, Plotly · SciPy, EDA · Feature Engineering, Data Cleaning
Python (advanced), Java, SQL · JavaScript · OOP, DSA, REST APIs

items.desc: Spearheading development of the first-ever Quantum Facial Biometric System, integrating classical Computer Vision with Quantum Machine Learning using VQCs and hybrid CNN architectures.
Built end-to-end ML pipelines for House Price Prediction, Wine Quality Prediction, and Iris Classification using Scikit-learn and Pandas.
Comprehensive training in supervised and unsupervised learning algorithms, feature engineering, and model evaluation using Python and Scikit-learn.

sections.title: Natural Language
sections.sub: Building intelligent language systems with Transformers, RAG pipelines, and LLM agents.

items.dd: Tokenization, Stemming, POS Tagging · Sentiment Analysis · NLTK, spaCy
BERT, GPT Architectures · Attention Mechanisms · LangChain, LangGraph
Retrieval-Augmented Generation · LangGraph QA Agents · Prompt Engineering · Vector Stores
GloVe, Word2Vec · BiLSTM, RNN · VAEs, GANs · Human-in-the-Loop AI

items.text: Intelligent query-answering agent using LLM + LangGraph state machine.
Retrieval-Augmented Generation with FAISS vector store and LangChain.
Interactive AI workflow with LangChain and Streamlit.
1D CNN architecture for multi-class sentiment classification.

sections.title: Deep Learning &
sections.sub: From CNNs and autoencoders to custom from-scratch implementations with NumPy.

items.dd: Image classification, object detection (YOLO), feature extraction
LSTM, GRU, BiLSTM for sequential data and time-series
Denoising autoencoders, anomaly detection, representation learning
GANs for image synthesis, VAEs for latent space learning
Production-grade model development and deployment
Rapid prototyping and model experimentation
ANN with full backprop, momentum SGD, L2 regularization
Fine-tuning pre-trained models for domain-specific tasks

sections.title: Reinforcement
sections.sub: Implementing classic RL algorithms — from value iteration to Monte Carlo methods.

items.dd: Dynamic programming for optimal policy computation in MDPs
First-visit & every-visit MC prediction, MC control
Value functions for stochastic policies, Bellman equations
OpenAI Gym, custom gridworld MDPs
FrozenLake, Blackjack, CartPole environments
States, actions, rewards, transition probabilities
Pure numpy RL implementations for deep understanding
Comparison of model-based and model-free approaches

sections.title: Quantum Machine
sections.sub: Qiskit Advocate 2025 · Presenter at Supercomputing India 2025 (C-DAC / MEITY) · Pioneering hybrid quantum-classical systems.

badge.title: IBM Qiskit Advocate 2025
badge.text: Selected for the prestigious IBM Qiskit Advocate Program — recognized for outstanding contributions to the quantum computing community through research, education, and open-source collaboration.

items.dd: VQCs for classification and optimization tasks
QCNN architectures, hybrid classical-quantum layers
QSVM, quantum-enhanced feature spaces
QASM Simulator, real quantum hardware execution
Circuit design, quantum gates, measurements, transpilation
Grover's search, oracle circuits, amplitude amplification
Seamless classical-quantum integration with PyTorch
Qubits, entanglement, superposition, quantum noise

items.name: Indian National Throwball Team

contact.title: Let's build
contact.lead: Open to research collaborations, internships, and exciting AI projects. Whether quantum computing, deep learning, or the next generation of AI systems — I'd love to connect.
